common.footerBadges: GDPR-compliant · SSL-encrypted (256-bit) · Secured by Cloudflare · Servers in DE/EU

intro.headline: Your new website — configured in just a few minutes.
intro.sub: Answer a few questions and instantly get a suitable package with a price. No obligation.

persona.title: Who are you?
persona.sub: Choose your industry — we'll suggest suitable options.

questions.title: A few quick questions
questions.sub: We've pre-selected suitable answers for you — just adjust them. New questions appear depending on your answers.

linkPh.concept: Link to your draft (Figma, PDF, Google Docs …)

questions.siteNotesPh: What should stay, what bothers you? (e.g. “outdated design”, “keep the copy”)
questions.siteUploadLabel: Upload a file (optional) — draft, screenshots, briefing

hasSite.title: Do you already have a website, social page or a concept?
hasSite.hint: So we start at the right point. If yes, paste the link.

selfbuilt.title: Did you build this website yourself — e.g. with AI tools?
selfbuilt.hint: Lovable, Wix AI, Framer AI, Webflow … Then we'll just take it live cleanly and legally compliant.

opts.nein: No, professionally built or grown over time
opts.ja: Yes, built myself with AI tools

aiHas.title: What does your current site already have? (Current state)
aiHas.hint: Multiple choice — so we know what we're building on.

aiMissing.title: What's still missing for a professional go-live? (Target state)
aiMissing.hint: Multiple choice — we derive your recommendation from this.

byowScope.title: Is your site finished as is — or do you still need changes?
byowScope.hint: Go live only: we take it over unchanged. Changes + go live: we treat your AI site as a design concept and professionally finish it.

opts.live: Just take it live — everything's there
opts.changes: Make changes and then take it live

pages.title: Roughly how many pages do you need?
pages.hint: Count roughly: homepage, contact, team, services/products, individual product or service pages … Legal notice & privacy policy are always included.

langs.title: In how many languages?
langs.titleByow: In how many languages should the site be available?

contact.title: How should your customers get in touch?

fees.title: Are the appointments paid?
fees.hint: e.g. consulting, coaching, treatment — then we set up secure payment (Stripe) right at booking. Costs extra.

shop.title: Do you want to sell online?
shop.hint: Products or services — service businesses sell online too: consulting packages, courses, vouchers, bookable appointments.

blog.title: Do you want a blog / news section?

assets.title: Do you already have a logo & imagery?

configurator.includedSub: One-time {price} — this is what you get at no extra cost:
configurator.byosNote: The Bring Your Own Website package includes no content or design changes. All adjustments are billed as separate iterations at {price} each.
configurator.extrasSub: Only pick what you need. Recommended items are marked.
configurator.extrasLaunch: Cheaper now at launch — bookable later, then more expensive.
configurator.includedInAi: Included in the AI Agentic Bundle
configurator.catNoteKiInBundle: Already included in the AI Agentic Bundle.
configurator.catNoteKiTip: Tip: ~40% cheaper in the AI Agentic Bundle (below).
configurator.careIntro: We keep your website secure & legally safe. {hint}
configurator.billingHintYearly: All monthly prices with annual payment (−{pct}%).
configurator.billingHintMonthly: Monthly prices with monthly payment — pay annually and save {pct}%.
configurator.cfSetupOnly: {setup} setup · ongoing costs included in the care plan
configurator.vipNote: Platinum bonus: VIP support free for the first 3 months.
configurator.bakNotAvailable: Not available for Bring Your Own Website
configurator.aiHeadline: Your digital assistant — runs 24/7, with no extra effort for you.
configurator.aiSub: AI chatbot, content engine, automated review responses and AI visibility monitoring — about 40% cheaper in the bundle than individually ({single}).
configurator.yearlyNoteActive: Annual payment active: {yearTotal}/yr. — you save {savings}/yr. compared to monthly.
configurator.yearlyNoteInactive: Save {pct}%: with annual payment only {discounted}/mo. instead of {full}.
configurator.shareHint: Open this link on another device to pick up exactly where you left off.
configurator.disclaimer: Non-binding estimate. Final prices, no VAT (reverse charge, service provided by IntelliPaaS Inc., USA).

reasons.byowChanges: Since you still need changes, we treat your self-built AI site as a design concept and professionally finish it. With Gold you get the full rebuild — up to 8 pages, 2 languages, blog and SEO basics. "Bring Your Own Website" remains selectable if you only want to go live after all.
reasons.byowLive: You've already built your site yourself and just want to go live — "Bring Your Own Website" takes it live cleanly, securely and legally compliant: domain, hosting in Germany, SSL, email, Cloudflare proxy and acceptance test. Tip: for maximum impact, we're happy to build you a professional website from scratch with Gold.
reasons.silver: Ideal for a lean, professional presence with up to 4 pages.
reasons.gold: The main deal: up to 8 pages, 2 languages, blog and SEO basics — best value.
reasons.platinum: The big presence: up to 12 pages, 3 languages, premium design, Cloudflare security and a CMS for self-management.

why.shop: Premium base for the full online shop

lead.title: Almost done!
lead.sub: We'll contact you personally — no obligation and free of charge.
lead.onceHeader: One-time — what you pay & receive once
lead.zielLabel: What do you want to achieve?
lead.zielPh: e.g. Get more inquiries via Google
lead.optionalIntakeSub: All optional — the more we know up front, the faster your website goes live.
lead.consent: I consent to the processing of my data in accordance with the <link>privacy policy</link>.
lead.errEmail: Please enter a valid email address.
lead.errTel: Please enter your phone number — we will call you.
lead.errConsent: Please consent to the data processing.
lead.errSubmit: Something went wrong. Please try again.
lead.noRisk: No risk — the initial call is non-binding.
lead.sslLong: SSL/TLS-encrypted (256-bit) · Secured by Cloudflare · Servers in DE/EU · GDPR-compliant
lead.calendlyTitle: Pick your preferred appointment right away
lead.calendlySub: Your inquiry has been received. Book your non-binding initial call now — or add your content first.
lead.calendlyBooked: Appointment booked — we look forward to the call!

stage2.banner: Done! We'll be in touch shortly.
stage2.bannerSub: Want to go live faster? The more you share now, the more impressive your first draft will be. All voluntary — you can also add things later.
stage2.title: Make your website great
stage2.readinessLow: Good start! Just your logo and 2–3 sentences make a big difference.
stage2.readinessMid: Strong! Your first draft is already getting much more personal.
stage2.readinessHigh: Excellent — with this we'll build you an impressive first draft.

notes.unternehmen: These details also flow into your legal notice.
notes.markeWithUrl: We'll review {url} and automatically take over what we find there.

einsatz.label: What you do in one sentence
einsatz.ph: e.g. We renovate bathrooms — fast and clean.

zertifikate.label: Certificates, master titles, guilds, TÜV, awards

bewertungen.label: Reviews / testimonials
bewertungen.ph: Or: "take them from my Google profile"

stage2.uploadFotos: Photos: team, premises, products, work samples
stage2.uploadAccept: JPG, PNG, WebP, PDF, DOC · max. 25 MB per file
stage2.driveLabel: Lots of material? Paste a Google Drive/Dropbox link instead

done.title: Thank you! We've received your inquiry.
done.sub: No risk — the initial call is non-binding.
done.disclaimer: Non-binding estimate · Final prices, no VAT (reverse charge, invoice from IntelliPaaS Inc., USA) · We'll also send you the summary by email.
